reviews.comment:
El Automóvil Club Argentino, soy socia y allí Martín y su equipo manejan excelentemente el taller y área de lavado, con exquisita atención. Muy recomendable.

(Translated by Google)
I'm a member of the Argentine Automobile Club, and Martín and his team run the shop and car wash area there excellently, providing exquisite service. Highly recommended.
